name: 松影棋院
prompt: Mountain courtyard under tall pine trees, traditional Chinese stone table with a Go board, dappled sunlight, misty morning air, tranquil wuxia atmosphere, an elderly Taoist with a weathered face, white moustache, white hair and beard, kind smile, wearing traditional Taoist robes and holding a dust whisk, carrying a Go board case, a young traveler in plain clothes seated across, use character reference: /public/game/isometric/characters/npc_musang_daoren.png, consistent character design, cinematic composition, highly detailed digital painting, 4K

name: 桑AI诞生
